nasb.text: So the Philistines gathered together and came and camped in Shunem; and Saul gathered all Israel together and they camped in Gilboa.

esv.text: The Philistines assembled and came and encamped at Shunem. And Saul gathered all Israel, and they encamped at Gilboa.

cnv.text: 非利士人聚集起來，來到書念安營；掃羅也聚集以色列眾人，在基利波安營。

ccb.text: 非利士人集合起来，在书念扎营，扫罗率领以色列军队在基利波扎营。
